commit_scope: Resolve home field-story presence metrics from the live trace API at render time, using presence-walk JSON metrics only as fallback.

commands: cd web && npm test -- tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts (first pass found missing fresh-worktree dependency: vitest)
cd web && npm run build (first pass found missing fresh-worktree dependency: next)
THREAD_RUNTIME_START_SERVERS=1 ./scripts/verify_worktree_local_web.sh (rerun after transient local API timing failure)
local_validation.summary: The home presence projection now awaits getHomePresenceTraceCards(), and that helper resolves /api/field-stories trace links through the server API before returning cards. Field-story cards display the live event count when the trace API responds; the JSON metric remains a fallback for unavailable trace reads. A transient local API timing failure in the shared verifier passed on direct rerun, and worktree_pr_guard then reported ready_for_push=True.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR checks, and merge verification.

deploy_validation.details: Public web verification will be performed after merge and deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Homepage trace cards no longer freeze field-story event counts in JSON. Liquid Bloom and Mose counts can follow the live trace API after trace indexes change.
test_flows: home page awaits getHomePresenceTraceCards before rendering the living-lineage cards
getHomePresenceTraceCards resolves /api/field-stories trace metrics through fetchJsonOrNull
focused home lineage test and production build both pass

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; commit, push, PR, checks, merge, and public verification remain pending.
